_comment: Stage 2 data manifest — LLaVA-1.5 mix665k (~665K instruction-tuning samples). The JSON itself is in liuhaotian/LLaVA-Instruct-150K as llava_v1_5_mix665k.json; convert to JSONL (one sample per line). Images come from a mixture of sources (COCO train2017 ~19GB, GQA ~21GB, Visual Genome ~17GB, OCR-VQA ~4GB, TextVQA ~8GB) which must be downloaded separately and unified under image_root with the layout the JSON expects (image path is relative to image_root).
